Container.Name: MCSManager-Web
Container.Overview: MCSManager (MCSM) is a fast, lightweight, open-source, web-based game server management panel. Manage multiple Minecraft Java/Bedrock, Steam, and other game servers from a single intuitive interface. Supports real-time console logging, automated backups, scheduled tasks, and multi-user support with granular permissions. NOTE: This is the Web UI component. You must also run the MCSManager-Daemon container. After installation, open the Web UI, go to Nodes, set a name for the Node, and set the Daemon IP to YOUR_UNRAID_IP
Container.Requires: MCSManager-Daemon must also be running. It's best to install this one second.

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Port to access the MCSManager web interface.

Config.Name: Web Data
Config.Description: Stores MCSManager web panel data including settings and user configs.

Config.Name: Daemon Data (Read)
Config.Description: Allows the Web panel to read the Daemon configuration automatically.
